title: Coolbitz Special Forces Toy Army Combat Mission Special SWAT Soldier Action Figures with Military Weapons and Accessories 11 Pcs Men Modern Warfare Soldier including (Gun, Grenades) Detailed Plastic
features: Complete Special Forces Tactical Gear Set: Includes toy gun, camera, hand grenades, handcuffs with keys, bullets, binoculars, compass, and more. Each piece is made from durable, non-toxic plastic for safe and long-lasting play.
Realistic Role-Playing Experience: Kids can dress up with the included helmet and badges, immersing themselves in imaginative play as real-life heroes, enhancing creativity and storytelling skills.
Educational and Developmental: Engages children in complex play scenarios that enhance cognitive and motor skills, providing both fun and educational value.

Safe and Fun Archery Set: Features a plastic crossbow with a scope, three suction cup arrows, a quiver, and a target. The safety trigger and suction cup arrows ensure a secure and enjoyable play experience, improving hand-eye coordination and focus.

Indoor and Outdoor Play Ready: Perfect for playdates, parties, and family gatherings, this versatile playset can be enjoyed both indoors and outdoors. The archery set's target can be easily hung anywhere, creating endless fun and competition.
description: Product Description Young adventurers with Special Forces and Archery Playset! Designed for children ages 6-12, this extensive set combines the excitement of tactical play with the thrill of archery, providing hours of active, imaginative fun. Contents: A toy gun, camera, hand grenades, handcuffs with keys, bullets, binoculars, a compass, and a plastic crossbow featuring a scope, three suction cup arrows, a quiver, and a target. Each piece is crafted from durable, non-toxic plastic, ensuring safe play. Role Play: Dress up with the included helmet and badges to complete the Special Forces experience. This set lets kids engage in creative role-playing, allowing them to feel like real-life heroes. Educational Value: Enhances cognitive and motor skills, as children navigate through complex play scenarios. Perfect for Indoor and Outdoor Play: Our playset is ideal for both indoor and outdoor settings, making it perfect for playdates, parties, and family gatherings. The archery set includes a target that can be hung anywhere, creating a fun and competitive atmosphere. Skills Development: Excellent for improving concentration and physical skills, this set helps build hand-eye coordination and sharpens shooting skills. Product Specifications: Material: High-quality, child-safe plastic Includes: Extensive assortment of playset accessories as shown in images Recommended Age: 6 to 12 years
